title: senecio repollensis
intro: Senecio repollensis, also known as annual burnet-saxifrage or burnet-saxifrage, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is known to have medicinal properties due to its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Senecio repollensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of ulcers, gastritis, and other stomach-related problems. Senecio repollensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a variety of applications in traditional medicine.
